programme.desc: To save her reputation, Piper Jensen, a public relations genius and owner of her own PR company, agrees to work for the owner of a failing Santa's Village and discovers love and how magical Christmas is after all.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina moves into her friend's suite at The Chesterton Hotel as she waits for her divorce settlement to come through on Christmas Day. While there, she starts a whirlwind romance with a billionaire, who proposes to her.

programme.title: Princess Caraboo
programme.desc: A mysterious young woman speaking a strange language shows up in an English village, where she is taken in by aristocrats who assume she is a foreign princess

programme.title: White Tiger AKA Belyy Tigr
programme.desc: Great Patriotic War, early 1940s. After barely surviving a battle with a mysterious, ghostly-white Tiger tank, Red Army Sergeant Ivan Naydenov becomes obsessed with its destruction.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers: Airborne Creed
programme.desc: On August 15, 1944 the 517th Parachute Regimental Combat Team (PRCT) jumped over the south of France. Their mission was to support and protect the Allied Troops marching to Berlin. Landing in enemy territory, they fell under immediate attack. In their effort to complete the mission and rendez-vous with their unit, three isolated paratroopers come across a group of French resistants in desperate need. They decide to help liberate some of the captive Partisans. Doing so they will risk their lives.

programme.title: Metal Tornado
programme.desc: An American company inadvertently unleashes a magnetic vortex on an unprepared world. The earth's upper atmosphere is supercharged by a monstrous solar flare creating massive magnetic vortexes that shoot down to Earth in the form of giant tornados. These magnetic tornados begin drawing all metal objects into themselves, pulverizing everything in their path as they tear across the planet!

programme.title: Day Zero
programme.desc: Day Zero follows the lives of three best friends in New York City who have thirty days to come to terms with their fate, being drafted into the military. Rifkin (CHRIS KLEIN) is a married lawyer whose career is on the rise. Feller (ELIJAH WOOD) is working on his second novel. The first was a smash success, but he's having a writer's block. Dixon (JON BERNTHAL) drives a cab and lives a solitary life. Over thirty days, they will find their relationships tested as they confront long held beliefs about life, death, courage and love.

programme.title: Je criais contre la vie ou pour elle
programme.desc: In the forest, the herd of deer turns against the hound dogs that have been chasing them so far. From this unusual chase, new landscapes arise from the ground. This collage drama was made after an idea from a 19th century engraving.

programme.title: Bulldog Drummond's Peril
programme.desc: In this episode captain Drummond tries to find the killer of various people. All assassinations were provoked by a diamond of great value, but Drummond will face the danger.

programme.title: Cherzoso The Silent Film
programme.desc: Cherzoso is a short silent film about family, life choices and consequences.

programme.title: Bridge The
programme.desc: The film delves into the life of a young girl as her perception of the world as she knows it falls completely apart in just over a night in London, when her sister goes missing.

programme.title: One More Time
programme.desc: An 80-year-old actress returns to the small Chilean town of her youth to fulfill her father's dream of creating a TV channel in a place which has never known television.

programme.title: Bridge The
programme.desc: The film delves into the life of a young girl as her perception of the world as she knows it falls completely apart in just over a night in London, when her sister goes missing.

programme.title: Human
programme.desc: He is a silent man. He walks the streets, watching, looking for the right place. He finds it. In the middle of a market…

programme.title: The Mother of the Lamb
programme.desc: Cristina (49) has spent her life taking care of her mother Carmen. Single and without a trade or friends, she grows older, year after year in her hometown. A few days from her birth- day, Cristina reconnects with Sandra, a former schoolmate who will show

programme.title: Foster
programme.desc: A heart-warming story of family and friendship starring Academy Award Nominee Toni Collette and Ioan Gruffudd.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: A comedy centered on three museum security guards who devise a plan to steal back the artworks to which they have become attached after they are transferred to another museum. Starring: Morgan Freeman, Christopher Walken, Joseph McKenna, Wynn Everett

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: A Boy Called Sailboat
programme.desc: A small family finds hope in their extraordinary son named Sailboat when a personal gesture awakens a global desire.

programme.title: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: A pair of high-frequency traders go up against their old boss in an effort to make millions in a fibre-optic cable deal.

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp. When he gets to the Space Center, Jimmy finds himself working alongside genius kid candidates from all over the world, instantly impressing them with his vast knowledge of space. He even breezes through the physical training, particularly on the machines that make all the other first-timers puke. But when Jimmy discovers that astronauts in the International Space Station are about to run out of air, he assembles the young team, motivating them to work around the clock to find a solution.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: Max Winslow and the House of Secrets
programme.desc: Five teens are invited to the home of an eccentric billionaire to compete in a game to win his mansion. The night takes a dark turn when they become trapped in the house and are forced to face off against each other and an evil AI entity who controls everything in the house including their fate. This film contains a sequence of flashing lights which might affect customers who are susceptible to photosensitive epilepsy.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Welcome to the not-too-distant future, where implanted microchips record every single moment of a person's life. Upon death, it becomes the job of a "cutter" like Alan Hakman (Oscar-winner Robin Williams) to edit down the deceased's entire lifetime into a fitting memorial film. For years, he has used his god-like power of final cut to absolve the dead of a multitude of sins. But when, on his latest assignment, he views a terrible secret that can't be erased, Hakman finds his own life in jeopardy in this riveting science fiction thriller.

programme.title: My Daddy is in Heaven
programme.desc: Becky, Adam and their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragic accident during a 4th of July celebration kills their father. Struggling with grief, Becky decides she needs to leave the family farm and all its memories. She leaves Acie with her grandfather Ben and visits with her friend from school, June. With all the best intent, June offers Becky plenty of distraction from her family life. Fueled by her anger at G*d and loss of faith, Becky starts drinking and making other self-destructive choices. Then, after Becky is arrested, Ben threatens to keep Acie until Becky is back on track. A chance encounter in a bus station with a traveler gives Becky what she needs to restore her faith and reunite with her family.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: Psychological thriller. A woman tries to help her sister remember the events surrounding the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: A girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) takes her brother (Tyler Humphrey) and dog on an adventure after an angel grants her three wishes.

programme.title: Ice Girls
programme.desc: A figure skater is injured during a competition. A coach that hired her then helps her rehab her injury so that she may live her dream.

programme.title: It Had to be You
programme.desc: When her ad agency is absorbed by a much larger, more powerful firm, Darby's rivalry with new partner Derrick could blossom into something else.

programme.title: 10 Years
programme.desc: 10 Years follows a group of friends on the night of their high school reunion who, a decade after leaving school, still haven't quite grown up. Among the friends is Jake (Channing Tatum) who is deeply in love with his girlfriend and ready to propose until he runs into his high school flame (Rosario Dawson) for the first time in years. As the night goes on friendships are reignited, rivalries reemerge and for some, love is found in unexpected places.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery, all while juggling a blossoming romance with her client's brother.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: Playing For Keeps is a romantic comedy about a charming, down on- his luck former soccer star (Gerard Butler) who returns home to put his life back together. Looking for a way to rebuild his relationship with his son, he gets roped into coaching the boy's soccer team. But his attempts to finally become an “adult” are met with hilarious challenges from the attractive “soccer moms” who pursue him at every turn.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Jessica Tucker, a widow and successful doctor, is trying to juggle work and family when she learns she's up for the top job at the hospital. For a well-deserved vacation, Jessica books a stay at a resort in Fiji so she and her daughter can disconnect and bond. During her stay, Jessica strikes up a friendship with Will, the charming owner of the resort. As Jessica and Will spend more time together, she begins to relax and starts to wonder if this island paradise can give her the life – and love – she's always hoped for.

programme.title: Shattered Glass
programme.desc: The story of a journalist who fell from grace when it was discovered he fabricated over half of his articles.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: A biopic depicting the early years of aviator Howard Hughes' career from the late 1920s to the mid 1940s.

programme.title: The Man with the Iron Heart
programme.desc: Two Czechs prepare for a suicide mission to assassinate the hideous mastermind behind the "Final Solution".

programme.title: Priceless
programme.desc: Set against the wildly atmospheric backdrop of the French Riviera, Jean (Gad Elmaleh), a shy young bartender is mistaken for a millionaire by beautiful scheming opportunist Irene (Audrey Tautou). Abandoned when she discovers his true identity, a love-struck Jean has no intention of letting someone this gorgeous get away! Jean's comical attempts to gain Irene's affection gradually evolve to him setting himself up as a gigolo at the luxury hotel she is staying at...and then the fun really begins. A sexy and thoroughly charming romantic comedy, if you love Breakfast at Tiffany's, you'll love this.

programme.title: Tomorrow Morning
programme.desc: Tomorrow Morning is the story of one couple seen in two separate timelines, a decade apart. This is a story of life, love, misunderstanding and hope... a universal and timeless tale.

programme.title: Wild Oats
programme.desc: Everything changes for Eva when she receives a life insurance check accidentally made out for five million dollars instead of the expected fifty thousand dollars. She and her best friend take the money and head out for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Monster
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must confront a terrifying monster when they break down on a deserted road.

programme.title: 10 Things We Should Do Before We Break Up
programme.desc: The night Abigail (Christina Ricci) meets Ben (Hamish Linklater) at a bar, they jokingly come up with a list of things to do before their imagined breakup, knowingly full well theyll never even start a relationship. But when the joke turns in to a one-night stand things become a whole lot more complicated.

programme.title: All Roads Lead To Rome
programme.desc: A timeless and moving romantic comedy. Uptight mother Maggie (Sarah Jessica Parker: Sex and the City) and her former Italian lover, Luca, go on a road trip across scenic Italy pursuing Maggie's rebellious teenage daughter (Rosie Day: Outlander) who tries desperately to return to New York. An unmissable, feel-good rom-com with a stellar cast. Not to be missed!

programme.title: Dog Eat Dog
programme.desc: Based on true events and directed by visionary filmmaker Paul Schrader (Raging Bull), this high-octane crime thriller stars Academy Award winner Nicolas Cage (Snowden) and Willem Dafoe (John Wick). Three men, all out of prison, now have the task of adapting themselves to civilian life, until they are offered a job by an eccentric mob boss with a payoff too good to turn down.

programme.title: The Bay of Silence
programme.desc: Do you truly know the ones you love? When Will (Claes Bang) discovers his wife (Olga Kurylenko) and three children have suddenly disappeared, his perfect world begins to unravel. Setting out on a frantic search and finding them in a remote village in northern France, relief soon turns to horror as he discovers that his infant son has mysteriously died. Also starring Succession's Brian Cox.

programme.title: Mr. Christmas
programme.desc: Tom has built a business around helping clients find the perfect gift for their loved ones. But things become complicated when his friend hires him to buy a present for his girlfriend (2017)

programme.title: Mr. Christmas
programme.desc: Tom has built a business around helping clients find the perfect gift for their loved ones. But things become complicated when his friend hires him to buy a present for his girlfriend (2017)

programme.title: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: Eric is known for being a Christmas grouch. But will his neighbour and young relatives teach him to embrace the prospect of love and the spirit of Christmas? Jesse Metcalfe stars. (2017)

programme.title: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: Eric is known for being a Christmas grouch. But will his neighbour and young relatives teach him to embrace the prospect of love and the spirit of Christmas? Jesse Metcalfe stars. (2017)

programme.title: Cupid for Christmas
programme.desc: Cupid is keen to retire and pass-on his magical bow and arrow to Ruby. But when a matchmaking assignment goes awry, he sets her the ultimate challenge of finding love for 'unmatchable' Charlie. (2021)

programme.title: Cupid for Christmas
programme.desc: Cupid is keen to retire and pass-on his magical bow and arrow to Ruby. But when a matchmaking assignment goes awry, he sets her the ultimate challenge of finding love for 'unmatchable' Charlie. (2021)

programme.title: A Dogwalker's Christmas Tale
programme.desc: A young dogwalker has until Christmas to save a popular park from being destroyed by a greedy developer. But first she must put aside her own selfish ways. Stars Lexi Giovagnoli (2015)

programme.title: A Dogwalker's Christmas Tale
programme.desc: A young dogwalker has until Christmas to save a popular park from being destroyed by a greedy developer. But first she must put aside her own selfish ways. Stars Lexi Giovagnoli (2015)

programme.title: Love Locks
programme.desc: Single mum Lindsey returns to Paris to show her daughter where she went to college. By chance, Lindsey bumps into her college boyfriend, Jack. Will they fall back in love after 20 years apart? (2017)

programme.title: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: Jamie Spellman struggles to balance her dream of painting with the reality of such a difficult career choice, while having to choose between two men who seem perfect, but for very different reasons.

programme.title: Mid Love Crisis
programme.desc: A single-mother realizes she's in a mid-life crisis. Starring Teri Hatcher (2022)

programme.title: Blackmail
programme.desc: Alice White, the sweetheart of London detective Frank Webber, murders in self-defense an artist who brutally attempts to seduce her in his studio.

programme.title: Circus of Horrors
programme.desc: Dr. Rossiter, a plastic surgeon wanted by the police, flees to France and under an assumed name acquires, by murder, a run-down circus.

programme.title: Night of the Eagle
programme.desc: Witchcraft and superstition are the principal forces behind this terrifying tale of a college lecturer who, due to recent rumors of promotion above senior colleagues, is hated by the rest of the staff hated so much in fact, that someone is preparing curses inducing the lecturer's wife to commit murder...

programme.title: House in Nightmare Park
programme.desc: Foster Twelve trees, who gives hammy readings from the classics, cannot believe his luck when Stewart Henderson and his sister offer him a fee to give a reading at their eerie stately mansion.

programme.title: THE UNCANNY
programme.desc: Peter Cushing stars as Wilbur Gray, an eccentric author.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: Golden Years
programme.desc: When Arthur and Martha find that their pension pot is virtually worthless they decide to take drastic action by robbing a bank! After their first robbery is successful they start to like the criminal lifestyle, but as the robberies get riskier will they be able to outwit the police as they close in?

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston).

programme.title: Kings
programme.desc: Millie (Halle Berry), a tough Los Angeles single foster mother and her neighbour Obie (Daniel Craig) must become allies as the city erupts in riots after the Rodney King trial in 1992.

programme.title: Anacondas
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe, the deadliest reptiles are back. The fourth installment in the Anaconda series.

programme.title: Anacondas
programme.sub-title: The Hunt For The Blood Orchid
programme.desc: When a corporate pharmaceutical sponsor is about to pull the plug on research, part-time adventurer Dr. Jack Byron re-awakens their interest with tales of the Borneo black orchid, said to produce a chemical that can keep a cell reproducing indefinitely. When the trip becomes increasingly dangerous, due to floods, capsized boats and gigantic, ill-tempered anacondas, Byron refuses to allow his crew to end the expedition, and resorts to foul play in order to keep them on the trail.

programme.title: The Exorcist III
programme.desc: A police lieutenant uncovers more than he bargained for as his investigation of a series of murders, which have all the hallmarks of the deceased 'Gemini' serial killer, lead him to question the patients of a psychiatric ward.

programme.title: The Exorcist III
programme.desc: A police lieutenant uncovers more than he bargained for as his investigation of a series of murders, which have all the hallmarks of the deceased 'Gemini' serial killer, lead him to question the patients of a psychiatric ward.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: In this love triangle comedy, a white collar executive and professional baseball player are each vying for the affections of the same woman.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Freaks of Nature
programme.desc: Aliens invade the earth as teenagers, zombies and vampire fight each other to the death and they must all band together and suppress their urge to kill each other long enough to repel the invasion.

programme.title: Freaks of Nature
programme.desc: Aliens invade the earth as teenagers, zombies and vampire fight each other to the death and they must all band together and suppress their urge to kill each other long enough to repel the invasion.

programme.title: June Again
programme.desc: During a fleeting bout of lucidity from her dementia, June Wilton has precious little time to bring together her estranged children, save the family business, and rekindle an old flame.

programme.title: Five Nights in Maine
programme.desc: A man, reeling from the tragic loss of his wife, travels to rural Maine to seek answers from his estranged mother-in-law, who is herself confronting grief. With David Oyelowo and Dianne Wiest.

programme.title: The Pursuit Of Happiness
programme.desc: An alienated social drop-out accidentally runs over a woman in a rain storm. Though he can prove it was an accident, he refuses to cooperate with "the establishment," and is sentenced to a year in prison. With only a week left to his sentence, he gets involved in a knifing and manages to escape. He looks up his old girlfriend and the two fly off to Canada.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: Enemy Within
programme.desc: When a Japanese fighter pilot crash-lands on the tiny remote Hawaiian island of Ni'ihau, he is met with courtesy and traditional Hawaiian hospitality from the locals.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: A group of competitors participates in a wild, illegal car race across America, where the drivers use every dirty trick in the book to win.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: Two women become bank robbers to help the poor and seek revenge on a ruthless land baron.

programme.title: Bunraku
programme.desc: Bunraku is the story of a a young man who has spent his life searching for revenge only to find himself up against a bigger challenge than he originally bargained for.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar S1 E29
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate S1 E29

programme.title: The Good Son S1 E29
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Mehek S1 E29
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats S1 E29

programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: The Peninsula
programme.desc: Mountains are responsible for the whole morphology of Iberia. They are also the birthplace of the rivers that distribute life throughout the territory.

programme.title: Meet The Meerkats
programme.desc: Meerkats live in close families and rely on their companions to watch their backs. In their vast and unforgiving home of the Namib desert, only together can they defeat the odds stacked against them. One young female is forced from her group, overcoming a brutal attack from the alpha pair and fearing for her life. Cast out and left to fend for herself, she has no choice but to roam the desert and find a way to live. Her only chance is to find a new pack to shelter her from the dangers of her home.

programme.title: Nature's Cutest
programme.desc: As we all know the natural world can be tough and challenging at times, but it can also be nothing short of adorable.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home known as Fortress burrow. It is close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live.In the quest for territorial dominance there has been a major meerkat standoff. This has resulted in both gangs losing a member of their tribe.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series, we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect. Through the eyes of the local communities and the conservation bodies, we follow a trail along the major rivers, mountains and deserts to see what can be achieved if countries work together to conserve a shared heritage.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series, we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect. Through the eyes of the local communities and the conservation bodies, we follow a trail along the major rivers, mountains and deserts to see what can be achieved if countries work together to conserve a shared heritage.

programme.title: Shark Alley
programme.desc: Hundreds of sharks follow and feed upon millions upon millions of sardines as the fish migrate up the south-eastern coast of Africa. Bronze Whalers, Ragged-Tooths, Hammerheads, Black-Tips, Duskies, Tigers, Bulls and the Big Daddy of them all – the Great White – are joined by dolphins, Cape gannets, seals and even a whale. It's ambush after ambush in a relentless series of attacks that climaxes with a humongous feeding frenzy. It's the largest predation of its kind on earth.

programme.title: The Peninsula
programme.desc: One of the most iconic habitats of the Iberia is the Mediterranean forest, the land of the Iberian Lynx, a unique and fascinating feline, with a history of success in conservation efforts

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: Madeira - Portugal's autonomous island in the Atlantic Ocean, is closer to the African coast than to the mother country Portugal, from which it is separated by about 900 kilometers. The island's name comes from Portuguese sailors who claimed the uninhabited isle for themselves in 1419. Madeira means wood and that was available in abundance. Almost the entire surface was covered by dense forest. Since 1982, two-thirds of the landscape has been protected.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The "Parque Natural da Ria Formosa" is one of the largest lagoon conservation areas in Europe. Bordered by five natural islands. A mosaic of sandbanks, brackish and freshwater lagoons and salt marshes. In 2010, the "Ria Formosa" was chosen as one of the seven natural wonders of Portugal. It is a unique ecosystem: in the winter months, more than 20,000 birds gather here. In addition, the nature park has one of the largest seahorse populations internationally. More than half of all fish species in the Atlantic are said to spawn in the lagoon.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Photographer Matthias Ziegler is an Africa specialist. He has visited nearly every country on the continent on assignments for international agencies. Zanzibar, however, is new territory for him. He's come to the former slave island for a photo book – and this time he's not alone. To see the Tanzanian archipelago from the air, he has enlisted the services of ultralight pilot Richard Meredith-Hardy of England to fly him around in his FIB, or flying inflatable boat. Perfect conditions for an adventurous journey: as a world champion ultralight pilot, Richard and his FIB can take off and land practically anywhere – in theory.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Renaud Van Der Meeren is a photographer and paramotor pilot. With his motorised parachute he goes on expeditions to the remotest corners on earth to photograph people and landscapes from the air. Renaud wanted to be a jet pilot, studied music at the Sorbonne, became a ski instructor, model and photographer's assistant before he found happiness in his current vocation. He especially likes to do his job in Mauritius – nowhere else does he find so many motifs as on the "sweetest pearl in the Indian Ocean". This time he's working on a photo book about Mauritius – by land, by water and in the air.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 8, Portugal
programme.desc: The next set of challenges are set in sunny Esposende in Portugal. With stars such as Travis Ortmayer, Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland, and Ervin Toots from Estonia. While Fabio Silva will defend the honour in his own country.

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 9, World Records (Part 1)
programme.desc: We are back in Germany, with the world record breakers. We promise you this is going to be amazing. Do not move from that seat, because we are going to see some records smashed today. Over 6 cruel events, you will see who gets crowned of the King Of The Castle!

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 10, World Records (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the next episode of Strongman Champions League Germany. Its the world record breakers, and in the last show we set two new records. Can more be records be broken before the king of the castle is crowned?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 11, Worlds 105 Kg (Part 1)
programme.desc: Welcome to Kokkola in Finland. This city will be the setting for the Lightweight World championship. Out of 24 athletes, only 16 will make it through to the final day, but who will champion each event and who is going to be eliminated?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 12, Worlds 105 Kg (Part 2)
programme.desc: Its the second day, and the top 16 athletes have made it through to the final round. With another 4 events to go who will get the crown of world champion?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 13, Ukraine
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 14, Romania
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 15, World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?
